videoSnippet.title: Of all the Games, Chess Scares Me The Most! || Yağız Kaan Erdoğmuş vs José Martínez || Biel 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator https://tournament.lotus-chess.com/tournaments
Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Erdogmus, Yagiz Kaan (2713) - Martinez Alcantara, Jose Eduardo (2650)
Biel Chess Festival 2026 (Chess.com) [10] 2026.07.18
C53 Giuoco Piano

1.e4 e5 2.Nf3 Nc6 3.Bc4 Bc5 4.c3 Nf6 5.d3 d6 6.O-O h6 7.Re1 O-O 8.h3 Bb6 9.Nbd2 Ne7 10.Nf1 Ng6 11.Ng3 c6 12.Bb3 d5 13.exd5 Nxd5 14.d4 exd4 15.Nxd4 Be6 16.Bc2 Ndf4 17.Re4 Qf6 18.Qf3 Bc7 19.Bxf4 Nxf4 20.Rxf4 Qxf4 21.Qd3 Rfd8 22.Qh7+ Kf8 23.Ndf5 Ke8 24.Nxg7+ Ke7 25.Nxe6 Kxe6 26.Bf5+ Ke7 27.Re1+ Be5 28.Re4 Rd1+ 29.Kh2 Rh8 30.Rxf4 Rxh7 31.Re4 Rg7 32.Rxe5+ Kf6 33.f4
